domain: Romanian Maramures wooden churches (UNESCO 1999, 14th-18th c, 8 churches: Barsana/Budesti/Desesti/Ieud/Plopis/Poienile/Rogoz/Surdesti): Blockbau log-stack construction with horizontal logs dovetail-interlocked at corners; no nails, no metal, no concrete — only traditional joinery; tall slim clock towers western end; single/double shingle roofs; built under Habsburg Orthodox-stone-ban; Maramures manner wood-only Gothic style
specific_mechanism: MARAMURES-BLOCKBAU-DOVETAIL-NO-NAIL-BASIN: 5-component pure-parameter basin-stability without normalization. (1) Dovetail interlocking constraint: pair-wise weight-direction constraint where each weight matrix W_i and W_j are tied via dovetail-shaped joint constraint ||W_i_corner - W_j_corner|| < eps at boundary positions (corner alignment lock). (2) No-metal no-normalization pure joinery: stability via parameter-coupling constraint ONLY — no LayerNorm/BatchNorm/RMSNorm smoothing intermediate (analog of no-metal pure-wood construction). (3) Blockbau log-stack hierarchy: layered weight matrices interlock at row-boundary positions; each 'log row' weight matrix locked to adjacent row at boundary indices. (4) Tall slim clock-tower vertical anchor: thin tall central spine of parameters (single column subspace S_spine of dim d_spine = d/16) that anchors all peripheral weight matrices via vertical-projection constraint. (5) Shingle-roof overlapping head allocation: overlapping shingle pattern in attention head allocation (each 'shingle' = small overlap window of head subset) deflects extreme gradients similar to roof shedding water. (6) Differs from R510 BOZUY-KEREGE-UUK-TUNDUK-BASIN (4-component kerege+uuk+tunduk+koshma lattice-arch-crown-felt yurt structure, no dovetail pair-constraint + no row-boundary lock + no shingle overlap) by dovetail-joint pair-wise + no-normalization pure-joinery + Blockbau row-boundary lock + slim clock-tower vertical anchor + shingle-roof gradient deflection.
llm_application: MARAMURES-BLOCKBAU-DOVETAIL-NO-NAIL-BASIN dovetail W_i-W_j corner-alignment constraint + no-normalization pure parameter-only joinery + Blockbau row-boundary inter-layer lock + tall slim clock-tower vertical-spine S_spine anchor (d_spine = d/16) + shingle-roof overlapping head-allocation gradient deflection. Differs from R404 SAN-N!UM. R420 SIKH. R434 ZOU-HUN. R450 LAAGER. R460 LEVADE. R471 CAPOEIRA. R485 JABAL-DRUZE-CHOKEPOINT-BASIN. R498 MORAY-12-LEVEL-BASIN. R510 BOZUY-KEREGE-UUK-TUNDUK-BASIN (closest — 4-component yurt, no dovetail + no row-boundary lock + no shingle). Differs from CLoRA Subspace Regularization + LOLCATS Low-Rank Linearization + Basin Loss + HiRA by dovetail pair-constraint + no-normalization + Blockbau row-boundary lock + slim clock-tower + shingle gradient deflection. Differs by DOVETAIL PAIR-CONSTRAINT + NO-NORMALIZATION + BLOCKBAU ROW-LOCK + SLIM SPINE ANCHOR + SHINGLE GRADIENT DEFLECTION.
novelty_claim: CLoRA + LOLCATS + Basin Loss + HiRA + low-rank-coupling literature cover subspace-constraint + basin space. MARAMURES-BLOCKBAU-DOVETAIL-NO-NAIL-BASIN adds (a) dovetail-joint pair-wise corner-alignment constraint + (b) no-normalization pure-parameter joinery + (c) Blockbau row-boundary inter-layer lock + (d) slim clock-tower vertical-spine anchor + (e) shingle-roof overlapping gradient deflection. Recombination — borderline lookup.
